---
title: "spatial_gradient"
generated: true
description: "Spatial gradient of a scalar field along each spatial axis."
---

[â€ą back to `nitrix.geometry.differential`](../nitrix-geometry-differential.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:spatial_gradient -->
```python
spatial_gradient(image: Float[Array, '... *spatial'], *, spatial_rank: int | None = None, scheme: GradientScheme = 'central', mode: BoundaryMode = 'nearest', spacing: Union[float, Sequence[float]] = 1.0) -> Float[Array, '... *spatial ndim']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:spatial_gradient -->
Spatial gradient of a scalar field along each spatial axis.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:spatial_gradient -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `image` | `Float` | `...` Ă— `*spatial` | â€” | Scalar field, `(..., *spatial)`. All trailing axes are spatial unless `spatial_rank` (or a sequence `spacing`) pins the rank; any leading axes are batch. For a multi-channel image move the channel axis to the front (a leading batch axis) before calling. |
| `spatial_rank` | `int | None` | â€” | `None` | Number of trailing axes to treat as spatial. `None` (default) infers from `spacing` (if a sequence) else assumes `image.ndim`. |
| `scheme` | `GradientScheme` | â€” | `'central'` | Derivative scheme: `"central"` (default), `"sobel"`, or `"scharr"`. `"central"` is the bare central difference; the others smooth along the off-axes for noise robustness. |
| `mode` | `BoundaryMode` | â€” | `'nearest'` | Boundary handling: `"nearest"` (default, edge-replicate -- the voxelmorph / QA convention, matching [`jacobian_displacement`](../nitrix-geometry-grid/jacobian_displacement.qmd)), `"reflect"`, `"mirror"`, `"wrap"`, or `"constant"` (zero-pad). |
| `spacing` | `Union[float, Sequence[float]]` | â€” | `1.0` | Voxel spacing per spatial axis (physical units). `float` -> isotropic; sequence -> per-axis (length `spatial_rank`). The central-difference denominator is `2 * spacing[axis]`. |

**Returns** `Float` â€” shape `...` Ă— `*spatial` Ă— `ndim`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen sections:spatial_gradient -->
::: {.callout-note}
Exact on affine intensity ramps (central differences reproduce the
analytic slope on a linear field, interior and -- under
`"nearest"` -- boundary).  Differentiable w.r.t. `image` (the
operator is linear), which is what lets it sit inside a
registration loss.
:::
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:spatial_gradient -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
| `*spatial` | the spatial axes of a grid (variadic) |
| `ndim` | number of spatial dimensions |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
